channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Boardrooms demand AI answers: Are executives prepared?
item.description: Many executives treat AI governance as a future concern, but the time to act is running out.

item.title: U.S. AI map reveals widespread adoption among ordinary people
item.description: Microsoft's report shows AI spreading into college towns, suburbs, and small businesses that were not present years ago.

item.title: Key disclosures missing from SpaceX's S-1 filing
item.description: PitchBook notes that SpaceX's S-1 lacks granular detail on some important metrics.

item.title: Why some CEOs still choose Europe over the U.S.
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
